scripts.e2e:serve: node -e "const {rmSync}=require('fs');for(const p of ['.wrangler/state','dist'])rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true})" && astro build && wrangler d1 migrations apply ymmv --local --persist-to .wrangler/state && wrangler d1 execute ymmv --local --persist-to .wrangler/state --file=test/e2e/seed.sql && wrangler dev -c dist/server/wrangler.json --port 8788 --persist-to .wrangler/state
